message_content: I am user alpha and I work in engineering. I collaborate closely with design and research.
My current focus is improving onboarding and reducing operational overhead.
I am user beta from the design team. I lead interface prototyping.
Our biggest challenge is aligning design handoff with engineering timelines.
I am user gamma and part of research. I run interview studies with participants.
We synthesize findings and share them with product and engineering weekly.
